<parameter=code>

# Check current rectangle state

print("\nCurrent rectangle (rows 34-43, cols 27-36):")

    print(f"{i:2d}: {row_str}")

# If the game is truly over, this won't work
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 4, 'col': 43}, 'SPACE'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
